Luxury conversion · Sleeps 4 + cots

The Stables

Luxury open-plan living with breathtaking valley views
🏠4Guests
🛌2Bedrooms
🛁2Bathrooms
🐕YesDogs

Set slightly apart from the other cottages, The Stables has been converted to the very highest standard. The open-plan lounge flows straight out onto a beautiful stone patio with private outdoor dining, BBQ and a view over the Cornish valley that guests mention in almost every review. Both bedrooms have their own en-suite — the master with a jacuzzi bath. Zip-and-link beds in both rooms can be set as king-size doubles or twins.

The property in full

Every room, every detail

🌎Valley view patio
🛁Two en-suite bathrooms
🍱Jacuzzi bath

Living areas

  • Entrance hall with coat & boot rack
  • Open-plan living room: kitchen, dining area & comfortable lounge
  • UHD Smart TV & Blu-ray
  • Kitchen: ceramic hob, fan-assisted oven, microwave, 2 fridges, washing machine & dishwasher
  • Stone patio: outdoor dining table, chairs & BBQ
  • Shared laundry: washing machine & tumble dryer

Bedrooms & bathrooms

  • Bedroom 1 — super king-size zip & link (double or twin) with en-suite: jacuzzi bath, shower cubicle, WC & wash basin
  • Bedroom 2 — super king-size zip & link (double or twin) with en-suite: shower room, WC & wash basin

Good to know

  • Ample private parking
  • Private stone patio with outdoor table, chairs & BBQ
  • EV charger & laundry on site
  • Shop 2 miles · Pub 2 miles · Beach 2 miles
  • No smoking · Short breaks available out of season
  • Towels, duvets, cot & highchair included
  • Welcome basket: tea, coffee, milk, sugar, herbs, salt & pepper

Farm facilities included

  • Heated indoor pool — 30°C year-round, 8am–8pm daily
  • Games room — table tennis, pool, foosball, giant Connect Four, soft play
  • Bluebell woodland walk — magical in April & May
  • Playing field with playground, swings & slide
  • Feed the Animals with Ruth — Sundays & Wednesdays
  • Duckpool Beach (National Trust) — 2 miles
  • Bude town & sea pool — 6 miles
